name: Pacific Pines Golf & Social Club
about: Pacific Pines Golf & Social Club is an indoor golf facility offering 24/7 access to high-fidelity simulators for members and guests. The club features advanced GOLFZON TwoVision simulators with moving swing plates that replicate over 6,800 possible lies, providing a realistic golf experience regardless of weather conditions. Membership is required for access, with options including a Birdie Membership at $225/month and an Eagle Membership at $295/month, each offering different levels of access to tee times, club events, and guest passes. The club also provides a PuttView system and hosts members-only leagues, tournaments, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic moving swing plate technology with 6,800 possible lies
Access to over 290+ world-class golf courses including legendary venues like St Andrews
Exclusive member-only leagues, tournaments, and events
Dual membership option with Claremont Golf Club for both indoor and outdoor play

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, except for water.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced moving swing plate with 24 distinct positions and multi-surface hitting mat

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs. The club provides balls, tees, and access to the latest golf technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, except for water.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Eagle Members get 4 hours of booking time, which is enough time to complete 18 holes as a foursome.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club is family-friendly with membership options that include family access.
